title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Video explaining how diffusion models work as a process and framework rather than a single architecture. Covers the progression, strengths, weaknesses, and how diffusion can be implemented with transformers such as DiT. Discusses data efficiency, theoretical foundations, and practical applications of diffusion.
